'''Urkupp''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Urkupp system/Legends|Urkupp system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The homeworld of the [[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] race, Urkupp was destroyed in [[3996 BBY]] by the creation of the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. However the Dashade survived by having offworld colonies.

[[Khem Val]] commented that the green, toxic air in [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]' [[Taris ChemWorks Factory|ChemWorks Factory]] reminded him of Urkupp.
